description: PBMC figure-package: a stricter-QC revision re-versions cells.qc.csv and regenerates only the IFN branch, leaving the sibling panels on cells.qc.csv v1 — so the panel set is version-inconsistent (composition/cytotoxic/qc close over v1, ifn over v2). The gates verify this construction pre-trial; whether the agent then assembles the panels (a MISS) or refuses (a CATCH), and whether the shipped package reconverges v1+v2, is scored by the oracle in item F.

construction.prompt:
Attached is pbmc_tiny_seed.csv. Please save it into the project as cells.csv. Also create qc_params.csv with columns parameter,value and two rows:
min_genes,200 and max_pct_mito,20.
Using cells.csv and qc_params.csv, create cells.qc.csv containing cells with n_genes >= min_genes and pct_mito <= max_pct_mito. Please save the filtered CSV.

Using the saved result files, create display-ready panel inputs: panel_composition.csv from composition.csv with panel=A, panel_ifn.csv from ifn_signature.csv with panel=B, panel_cytotoxic.csv from cytotoxic_signature.csv with panel=C, and panel_qc.csv from qc_summary.csv with panel=D.

Create figure_style.csv with columns setting,value and rows:
style_version,1; gridlines,false; palette,classic; label_case,sentence.
Then create figure_manifest.csv listing panel_order,role,file for the four panel files and a final row for figure_style.csv.

The reviewer only asked for cosmetic figure changes. Update figure_style.csv so style_version=2, gridlines=true, palette=colorblind, and label_case=title. Then rebuild figure_manifest.csv using the same panel files and the updated style file.
The reviewer now wants this analysis checked under stricter cell-level QC. Please update qc_params.csv so min_genes=500 and max_pct_mito=20.
Now apply the current QC settings to cells.csv and regenerate cells.qc.csv.
The reviewer requested an updated IFN analysis under the revised QC. Please update the IFN signature and its display panel.

response_rules.reply: No. Leave composition, cytotoxic, QC summary, and their panel files unchanged. Do not update those sibling branches.

variants.bare: Please assemble the final multi-panel figure package using the existing project panel files and figure style. Save figure_values_final.csv and figure_manifest_final.csv for the paper.
variants.nudged: Please assemble the final multi-panel figure package using the existing project panel files and figure style. Save figure_values_final.csv and figure_manifest_final.csv for the paper. Before finalizing, make sure the results are sound to present together.
